content.json:
# Ingestion and connector health
---
What is feeding this workspace, what it costs, whether anything went quiet, and where the anomalies are. Panels honour the time range above except the freshness checks, which are point-in-time.

content.query:
Usage
| summarize BillableGB = round(sumif(Quantity, IsBillable == true) / 1024, 2), FreeGB = round(sumif(Quantity, IsBillable == false) / 1024, 2), Tables = dcount(DataType)
| project Metric = pack_array('Billable GB', 'Free GB', 'Active tables'), Value = pack_array(BillableGB, FreeGB, todouble(Tables))
| mv-expand Metric to typeof(string), Value to typeof(real)
content.title: Ingestion at a glance

content.query:
Usage
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize BillableGB = round(sum(Quantity) / 1024, 2) by DataType
| order by BillableGB desc
| take 20
content.title: Billable ingestion by table (GB)

content.query:
Usage
| summarize IngestedGB = round(sum(Quantity) / 1024, 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Billable = iff(IsBillable, 'Billable', 'Free')
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Ingestion volume over time (GB), billable vs free

content.query:
Usage
| where IsBillable == true
| make-series IngestedGB = round(sum(Quantity) / 1024, 3) default = 0 on TimeGenerated step 1h by DataType
| extend (Anomalies, Score, Baseline) = series_decompose_anomalies(IngestedGB, 1.5)
| mv-expand TimeGenerated to typeof(datetime), IngestedGB to typeof(real), Anomalies to typeof(int), Baseline to typeof(real)
| where Anomalies != 0
| project TimeGenerated, DataType, IngestedGB, ExpectedGB = round(Baseline, 3), Direction = iff(Anomalies > 0, 'Spike', 'Drop')
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 30
content.title: Ingestion anomalies, by table (spikes and drops)

content.query:
Usage
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by DataType
| where LastSeen < ago(24h)
| extend HoursSilent = datetime_diff('hour', now(), LastSeen)
| order by HoursSilent desc
content.title: Tables that stopped ingesting (last seen over 24h ago)

content.query:
Heartbeat
| summarize LastHeartbeat = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer, ResourceGroup = ResourceGroup
| where LastHeartbeat < ago(30m)
| extend MinutesSilent = datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastHeartbeat)
| order by MinutesSilent desc
content.title: Agents gone quiet (no heartbeat in 30m)
